name: Lemon Dream Pie-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake empty pie shell according to package directions until golden brown.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine water, honey, lemon juice, cornstarch, butter, lemon peel, and salt. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 2 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Stir a small amount of the mixture into the yolks.
5. Pour the yolk mixture back into the honey mixture; mix thoroughly.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie shell. Chill.
7. To serve, top with whipped cream.
[Makes 8 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 480 Sodium: 242 mg Carbohydrates: 53.1 g Protein: 3.98 g Cholesterol: 175 mg Dietary Fiber: 0.61 g Total Fat: 29.8 g Cal. from Fat: 54%]
